testcase.name: test_01_login_works

failure.message: AssertionError: Login failed with status 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_ai_explanation.py:60: in test_01_login_works assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed with status {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Login failed with status 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Finding page failed with status 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_08_ai_explanation_log_exists
